title: Dictionaries
source_outline: Creating and accessing: key-value pairs; access by key
Adding, modifying, deleting: assignment, del, pop
Looping through dictionaries: items(), keys(), values()
Sorting dictionaries: by key and by value
Dictionary comprehension: building and inverting dictionaries

artifact_plan.profile_note: Corpus-builder suggested deep (~3050w); human accepted deep at HITL#2. 8 core sub-concepts, 7 mandated sub-topics each worked. No diagram (accepted). Week budget comfortable (~20/90 after this topic).
artifact_plan.diagram_note: Corpus-builder recommended no diagram: content is code/table-driven; list/set/dict comparison table carries the only structural contrast, Mermaid adds nothing. Matches 5.1 decision rationale (5.1 later overridden to a Mermaid ops-map at HITL#2; dicts have no comparable visual).

next_assessment.title: Data Structures Portfolio
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can choose and manipulate the right Python data structure for a given data-handling task.
